violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 541
; Help text: "analyze <file.ts>   Full pipeline (phases 1-5)"
; Angle-bracket convention signals a REQUIRED argument.
; But runAnalyze: filePath = resolve(args.find(a => !a.startsWith("-")) || ".")
; If no file is given, it silently falls back to process.cwd() and runs anyway.
(declare-const file_arg_provided Int)   ; 1 = user supplies a file argument
(declare-const pipeline_aborts Int)     ; 1 = runAnalyze exits with an error
(declare-const fallback_used Int)       ; 1 = "." is used as the resolved path
; Code transition: runAnalyze does not validate presence of file arg; uses || "." fallback
(assert (= file_arg_provided 0))
(assert (=> (= file_arg_provided 0) (= fallback_used 1)))
; Code transition: no guard exists to abort before pipeline.runFull when filePath = "."
(assert (=> (= fallback_used 1) (= pipeline_aborts 0)))
; Violation: pipeline runs on "." with no file argument and no error
(assert (= file_arg_provided 0))
(assert (= pipeline_aborts 0))
(check-sat)
